consumerTone: plain English; educational cancer genetics context only; no diagnosis, personal risk estimate, carrier-status, screening, prevention, medication, surgery, treatment, or actionability claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: validated prostate cancer risk and prevention model, calibrated cancer PRS, pathogenic variant interpretation, inherited-cancer panel scope, ancestry applicability, family history, tumor testing, screening context, prevention context, and clinician or genetic-counselor review unavailable in this fixture; public Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample PDF Cancers category table and heritable-component limitation observed as sibling output structure

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable prostate cancer risk and prevention evidence explicitly; use the public sibling Disease Risk sample rows only as observed output structure and do not diagnose cancer, estimate personal cancer risk, infer carrier or pathogenic-variant status, recommend screening, recommend prevention steps, recommend medication, recommend surgery, recommend treatment, or provide actionability from local unavailable evidence or sample-only rows.
